summary: Iteration 87 - Balance Sheet Keyboard Navigation Testing. All requested features verified working correctly. Frontend-only testing completed via Playwright.
critical_code_review_comments: Minor ESLint warning in BalanceSheet.jsx line 96 - missing dependency 'fetchData' in useEffect
context_for_next_testing_agent: Balance Sheet keyboard navigation fully working. All features tested: ArrowUp/Down for vertical nav, ArrowRight to expand groups or switch columns, ArrowLeft to collapse groups or switch columns, Enter to navigate to ledger or stock page. Stock-in-Hand has dotted underline and external link icon, clicking navigates to Milling (CMR) tab.

balance_sheet_renders_correctly.description: Balance Sheet shows Liabilities and Assets columns with proper totals
verified: Liabilities header visible
Assets header visible
Total Liabilities: 86,650.00
Total Assets: 86,650.00
Both totals balanced

keyboard_navigation_focus.description: Click on Balance Sheet activates keyboard mode
verified: Clicking balance sheet area activates keyboard mode
'Keyboard ON - Arrow keys, Enter to navigate' indicator visible
Yellow ring highlight (ring-amber-400) shows focused item

keyboard_arrow_down.description: ArrowDown moves focus to next item in list
verified: Focus ring moves down through groups and children
Works in both Liabilities and Assets columns

keyboard_arrow_up.description: ArrowUp moves focus to previous item in list
verified: Focus ring moves up through list
Stops at first item (doesn't wrap)

keyboard_arrow_right_expand.description: ArrowRight expands collapsed groups with children
verified: Capital Account expanded showing Opening Cash, Opening Bank
Cash & Bank Balances expanded showing Cash-in-Hand, Bank Accounts
Sundry Creditors expanded showing 9 child items

keyboard_arrow_right_switch_column.description: ArrowRight switches from Liabilities to Assets column when no group to expand
verified: After expanding all groups, ArrowRight switches to Assets column
Focus resets to first item in Assets column
Groups collapse when ArrowLeft pressed on expanded group
Children from child item collapses parent group

keyboard_arrow_left_switch_column.description: ArrowLeft switches from Assets to Liabilities column when nothing to collapse
verified: From first item in Assets with no expansion, ArrowLeft switches to Liabilities
Focus resets to first item in Liabilities column

keyboard_enter_child_navigation.description: Enter on child item navigates to Cash Book & Ledgers tab
verified: Pressed Enter on 'Local Party Accounts' child
Navigated to Cash Book & Ledgers tab
Active tab changed to 'Cash Book & Ledgers'

stock_in_hand_clickable.description: Stock-in-Hand group has dotted underline and external link icon
verified: Stock-in-Hand has data-testid='bs-group-stock-in-hand'
ExternalLink icon (lucide-external-link) present
Dotted underline style (underline decoration-dotted) applied

stock_in_hand_navigation.description: Clicking Stock-in-Hand navigates to Milling (CMR) tab
verified: Clicked on Stock-in-Hand group
Successfully navigated to Milling (CMR) tab
Milling tab shows stock data with entries

action_buttons_functional.description: PDF, Excel, Print, Refresh buttons present and functional
verified: Print button (data-testid='bs-print-btn') found
PDF button (data-testid='bs-pdf-btn') found
Excel button (data-testid='bs-excel-btn') found
Refresh button (data-testid='bs-refresh-btn') found

groups_expand_show_children.description: Expanding groups shows children with party names and amounts
verified: Capital Account children: Opening Cash (-20,000), Opening Bank (-10,000)
Sundry Creditors: 9 children including Local Party Accounts, Lokesh Fuels, etc.
Cash & Bank Balances: Cash-in-Hand, Bank Accounts

external_link_on_child_items.description: ExternalLink icon shows on hover for child items
verified: Child items have ExternalLink icon that appears on hover
Clicking child item navigates to Cash Book & Ledgers
